calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For An Order To Compel Compliance With Court Order Requiring: 1. Respondent'S Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One) 2. Respondent'S Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) 3. Respondent To Pay Monetary Sanction; And 4. Award Monetary Sanctions (Attorneys Fee And Costs)
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner's Motion For An Order Compelling Compliance With Court Order To Respond To Form Interrogatories (Set One), To Respond to Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond to Petitioner's Form Interrogatories (Set One) and Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) within 10 days of notice of this order. As the motion seeks a further order to pay previously awarded sanctions, Petitioner's remedy is to reduce that order to judgment. The failure to comply with the prior order was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $475, to be paid within 20 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Hearing On Petition For An Order To Compel Responsent'S Responses And Award Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Nathan Wang, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: California State Automobile; no other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner California State Automobile Association's Motion To Compel Respondent's Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $665, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
